description_long: This is a small, black ceramic cup with a rounded body and a single, sturdy handle. The exterior features bold, white text: one side reads 'GUANAJUATO' in all caps, while the opposite side displays the phrase 'FAVOR DE NO ESTAR CHINGANDO' in a similar style. The cup has a glossy finish, giving it a shiny, reflective appearance. The interior is also black and appears smooth, with a slightly irregular, handcrafted look. The cup is likely a souvenir or novelty item, referencing the city of Guanajuato and featuring humorous or colloquial Spanish text.
description: A glossy black ceramic cup with a handle, featuring bold white text and a smooth, shiny finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle and the word 'GUANAJUATO' in bold white letters.
description_view_1: Angled rear view highlighting the handle and the transition between the two text areas.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the phrase 'FAVOR DE NO ESTAR CHINGANDO' in white text.
description_view_3: Side-rear view showing the cup's rounded shape and partial text wrapping around the surface.
